world.title: DR Congo central bank in fresh bid to ban the doll
world.description: Foreign currencies have gradually overtaken the use of the weak local Congo franc in recent years in stores and other places. The Congo Central Bank has tried and failed in the past to ban the use of the dollar.

world.title: Full rollout of new EU border checks hit by delays and disruption

science.description: Comet C/2025 R3 (Pan-STARRS) is racing toward the sun, and the window to see it from the Northern Hemisphere is closing fast. A recent discovery by the Pan-STARRS survey in Hawaii, this long-period visitor returns to the inner solar system only once every 170,000 years. science.title: Dark matter might not be one thing - and that changes everything
